Maintainer.Profile:
Perpetual Software ships local-first developer tools that respect your data and run on hardware you control.
Pad is our project tracker for developers and AI coding agents — single Go binary, SQLite by default, MCP-ready (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex). Your data stays on your box, no telemetry, no account required.
Vendor: https://perpetualsoftware.org Pad source: https://github.com/PerpetualSoftware/pad Pad docs: https://getpad.dev/docs Issues: https://github.com/PerpetualSoftware/pad/issues
